name: 100 Bowls Soup & Stock

notes: The restaurant-linked Square storefront publishes 57 soup and broth products across Vegan Soups, Meat Soups, and Broth; five are presently sold out but remain published menu products.

The 67-product Square response also contains ten non-menu catalog records (classes, merchandise, donation, granola/cookie, and eggs), which the corrected snapshot excludes using the storefront section structure.

Five baseline rows map to current products; Thai Sweet Potato is stale, Seasonal Vegan Soup and Meat Soup are category placeholders, and Chili ambiguously collapses three distinct current chili products.
The nine-row baseline omitted 52 current menu products.

Forty current products have direct restaurant-authored ingredient evidence in the linked Square catalog; seventeen have only descriptions and remain accurately unavailable for detailed item-level allergen data.
Direct ingredient evidence supports mustard for Caraway Cauliflower, Creamy Mushroom, and Red Lentil Dal, and soy plus sesame for Miso Tofu Low FODMAP.

The restaurant separately states that its soups and broths are gluten-free and dairy-free. That global statement was not generalized into negative claims for egg, soy, sesame, nuts, fish, shellfish, mustard, sulfites, or cross-contact.
Coconut milk, dairy garnish suggestions, explicit without-cream wording, and buckwheat-instead-of-barley wording are not treated as contains signals.
The frozen baseline was produced by a hard-coded nine-row fallback in scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs rather than by item-level Square extraction.
The replacement fallback consumes a hashed audit snapshot derived from the storefront bootstrap section membership and linked Square product API.
The audit classifier maps only direct ingredient mentions, preserves unavailable status when item-level disclosure is incomplete, and does not infer sulfites from wine or vinegar.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Confirmed restaurant identity, Square ordering link, and global gluten/dairy-free statements; the site did not expose the full item catalog itself.
Recovered the official storefront section structure and product identifiers for Vegan Soups, Meat Soups, and Broth.
Retrieved all 67 visible Square catalog products and reconciled 57 soup/broth menu products with current descriptions, ingredient text, and availability.

findings.summary: The baseline publishes nine fallback rows instead of the 57 current soup and broth products, including three fabricated category/generic placeholders and one stale item.
findings.resolution: Prepared a 57-item corrected Square snapshot and changed the fallback source to consume it.

findings.summary: The baseline omits current items with direct mustard, soy, and sesame ingredient evidence and marks four matched ingredient-disclosed products unavailable.
findings.resolution: The corrected snapshot preserves 40 direct ingredient disclosures, including all four allergen-bearing products, while keeping 17 incomplete rows unavailable.

findings.summary: Naive keyword scanning would falsely interpret coconut milk, garnish suggestions, without-cream wording, and buckwheat comparison text as included dairy or gluten.
findings.resolution: The audit extraction uses labeled ingredient sections and conservative context suppression; focused tests cover the misleading phrases.

repairs.summary: Replaced the static nine-row 100 Bowls fallback with a hashed 57-item Square menu snapshot that preserves direct ingredient evidence and unavailable semantics.

notes: The frozen generated baseline was not overwritten; it remains the immutable audit input.
